plugins.name: pushnotifime
plugins.description: Human-in-the-loop for AI agents — on your phone. Your agent calls pushnotifi_request_ack, you tap Approve / Deny / Yes / No (or type a reply) on the PushNotifi mobile app, the agent's pushnotifi_await_ack returns your answer and the workflow continues. Backed by an MCP server and the PushNotifi.me API.
